file.description: Repo-relative path to the vulnerable file.

line_start.description: First line of the vulnerable code range.

line_end.description: Last line of the vulnerable code range.

vuln_class.description: Vulnerability class: SQLi, XSS, command-injection, path-traversal, SSRF, deserialization, auth-bypass, IDOR, etc.

description.description: Human-readable description of the vulnerability and its impact.

evidence.description: Code snippets, data flow trace, or reasoning that supports the finding.

poc_succeeded.description: Whether a proof-of-concept was successfully compiled or executed.

poc_code.description: Proof-of-concept code or command that demonstrates the vulnerability.

poc_output.description: Output captured from running the PoC.

cwe.description: CWE identifier if applicable (e.g. CWE-89 for SQLi).

remediation.description: Suggested fix or mitigation for the vulnerability.
